_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: this vector demonstrated substantial transduction in an NF1−/− iPSC-derived neurofibroma xenograft (3MM), as shown by anti-GFP IHC... AAV-K55-GFP primarily transduced the S100B-positive population
details: AAV-K55-GFP showed substantial transduction in pNF iPSC-derived neurofibroma xenograft, primarily targeting S100B-positive population
